responses: Hey there! How can I help you today?
Hello! What's on your mind?
Hi! Great to see you. What do you need?

Glad I could help!
I'm NovAI, your AI chatbot! I'm here to help you with questions, jokes, facts, and more.
I'm NovAI — a smart chatbot built to assist and entertain you!
I can help you with: 😄 Jokes | 🌤️ Weather info | ⏰ Time | 🧮 Math | 💡 Motivational quotes | 📚 Fun facts | 😤 Vent/talk | and much more! Just ask away!
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything! 😄

__TIME__
I can do basic math! Try typing something like '5 + 3' or '10 * 4' and I'll solve it for you! 🧮
🐙 Octopuses have three hearts and blue blood!
🍯 Honey never expires. Archaeologists found 3000-year-old honey in Egyptian tombs — still edible!

🦈 Sharks are older than trees. They've existed for over 400 million years!
🧠 Your brain generates about 23 watts of power — enough to light a small bulb!
Aww, thank you! You're pretty awesome yourself! 😊
That means a lot! I'm here to keep getting better for you! 💪
You're too kind! 😄
I'm sorry to hear that! I'm always learning and improving. Let me know how I can do better! 🙏
That's okay! I'll try harder. What can I help you with? 😊
I was just recently created, so I'm pretty young in AI years! 😄 Age is just a number anyway.

Hmm, I'm not sure about that one. Could you rephrase? 🤔

I'm not trained on that yet, but I'm getting smarter every day! 💡
